<USER_REQUEST>
You need to update BPMN node component files to add a required `nodeId` prop to `BpmnResizableNode`. The prop name is `id` in ReactFlow's `NodeProps`, and `nodeId` in `BpmnResizableNode`.

For EACH of these files, add `id` to the destructured props from `NodeProps` (alongside `data` and `selected`), then pass it as `nodeId={id}` to `<BpmnResizableNode>`.

Files to update:
1. `/Users/pabrik/working/mekarsa/products/varguard/bpmn/bpmn-management-system/src/components/bpmn/nodes/BpmnTaskNode.tsx`
2. `/Users/pabrik/working/mekarsa/products/varguard/bpmn/bpmn-management-system/src/components/bpmn/nodes/BpmnSubprocessNode.tsx`
3. `/Users/pabrik/working/mekarsa/products/varguard/bpmn/bpmn-management-system/src/components/bpmn/nodes/BpmnEventNode.tsx` (the `EventShell` component receives `id?` as prop and BpmnResizableNode needs `nodeId`; the 3 exported functions pass `id` from NodeProps down to EventShell)
4. `/Users/pabrik/working/mekarsa/products/varguard/bpmn/bpmn-management-system/src/components/bpmn/nodes/BpmnGatewayNode.tsx`
5. `/Users/pabrik/working/mekarsa/products/varguard/bpmn/bpmn-management-system/src/components/bpmn/nodes/BpmnDataObjectNode.tsx`
6. `/Users/pabrik/working/mekarsa/products/varguard/bpmn/bpmn-management-system/src/components/bpmn/nodes/BpmnDataStoreNode.tsx`
7. `/Users/pabrik/working/mekarsa/products/varguard/bpmn/bpmn-management-system/src/components/bpmn/nodes/BpmnAnnotationNode.tsx`
8. `/Users/pabrik/working/mekarsa/products/varguard/bpmn/bpmn-management-system/src/components/bpmn/nodes/BpmnGroupNode.tsx`

For each file:
1. Read the full current content first
2. Find the component function signature and destructure `id` from props  
3. Pass `nodeId={id}` to `<BpmnResizableNode>`
4. Write the updated file

Note for BpmnEventNode.tsx specifically:
- `EventShell` takes `label`, `selected`, `kind`, `doubleRing` currently
- Add `nodeId: string` to EventShell props
- Pass it to `<BpmnResizableNode nodeId={nodeId} ...>`
- The 3 exported nodes (`BpmnStartEventNode`, `BpmnIntermediateEventNode`, `BpmnEndEventNode`) need to destructure `id` and pass it as `nodeId={id}` to EventShell

Do NOT touch `BpmnPoolNode.tsx` or `BpmnLaneNode.tsx` — they don't use `BpmnResizableNode`.

Report what you changed in each file.
</USER_REQUEST>
